stemHtml:
An aircraft and an intruding aircraft both are TCAS II equipped.
How does the TCAS determine the bearing of the intruding aircraft?

options.a: By measuring the time lapse between the transmission of an interrogation signal and the reception of a reply signal.
options.b: Using the bearing function of the on-board weather radar.
options.c: By comparing the gps positions of the two aircraft.
